title: Papanasanathar Temple
tagline: Papanasanathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Papanasanathar Temple in Papanasam, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to Hindu god Shiva.
overview.description: Papanasanathar Temple in Papanasam, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to Hindu god Shiva. It is located 60 km from Tirunelveli. Constructed in the Dravidian architecture, the temple has three precincts. Shiva is worshipped as Papanasanathar and his consort Parvathi as Ulagammai.

topPlaces.name: Papanasam Dam
topPlaces.description: The Papanasam dam also known as Karaiyar Dam is located 49 kilometres (30 mi) away from Tirunelveli in Tamil Nadu, India. The dam is used to irrigate 86,107 acres (34,846 ha) of paddy fields in Tirunelveli and Tuticorin districts.

topPlaces.name: Papanasam, Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Papanasam also spelt as Pavanasam is a famous picnic spot in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It falls under the Ambasamudram Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Sivanthipuram
topPlaces.description: Sivanthipuram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kizha Ambur
topPlaces.description: Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

topPlaces.name: Manimutharu
topPlaces.description: Manimutharu is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kovankulam
topPlaces.description: Kovankulam is a hamlet in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. The spoken language in this area is Tamil.This village is located on Ambur-Papanasam Road.

topPlaces.name: A & F Harvey Brothers
topPlaces.description: A & F Harvey Brothers, first Spinning Cotton Mill, established by Scottish brothers Andrew Harvey and Frank Harvey, in the year 1880.

topPlaces.name: Valisvara Temple
topPlaces.description: Valisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Thiruvalisvaram in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Papanasanathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Papanasanathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Papanasanathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Papanasanathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Papanasanathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Papanasanathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Papanasanathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Papanasanathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Papanasam Dam, Papanasam, Tirunelveli, Sivanthipuram, Kizha Ambur, Manimutharu.
